vol_01_immutable_core.title: The Immutable Core: Receipts, Cylinders & Constitutional Truth
vol_01_immutable_core.market_rationale: Strong X.com conversation around 'immutable business records', 'private ledger ERP', and 'regulated accounting alternatives to SAP' — enterprises seeking trust + auditability without vendor lock-in.

chapters.promise: You will clearly see why traditional mutable ERP systems fail long-term trust and generational continuity.

chapters.chapter_title: Receipts as the Atomic Truth Unit
chapters.promise: You will design every economic event as a verifiable, signed receipt that survives audits and handoffs.
You will implement double-entry accounting as replayable, cryptographically witnessed obligations.

chapters.chapter_title: Human Primacy in Core ERP Events
chapters.promise: You will enforce human approval on all material ERP actions at the foundation layer.
You will declare the foundational rules that govern your entire ERP from day one.
You will gain honest, real-time visibility into the immutable ERP foundation.
You will confidently compare the sovereign immutable core against legacy ERP systems.
You will understand how a solid immutable core enables the full sovereign ERP stack.

chapters.chapter_title: YAML as the ERP Constitutional Skin
chapters.promise: You will declare and maintain your ERP governance rules as living, editable YAML.
beats: YAML as single source of truth

chapters.promise: You will author the exact roles and permissions your business needs.
You will model every business action with governed rules and scoping.
You will enforce human approval on all high-impact ERP decisions.
You will apply the governance skin to real vertical needs.
You will safely extend your ERP under constitutional guardrails.
You will run ERP across entities with clean, scoped access.
You will maintain governance alignment across generations and business evolution.

s5_03_helix.market_rationale: Growing interest in 'low-code ERP', 'declarative business systems', and 'AI-generated but governed code' — enterprises want speed without losing control.

chapters.promise: You will recognize why traditional documentation always drifts from the running system.

You will see natural language chapters become YAML, roles, surfaces, and tests automatically.
You will enforce Charter compliance on every generated artifact.
You will preview, govern, and release rendered artifacts from the sovereign decision surface.
You will apply reusable patterns to generate vertical-specific ERP functionality.

You will see how the book-as-backend becomes a true multi-generational operating covenant.
